stages.purpose: After the cancellation function becomes available, cancel the supplied stable ID exactly once.

state_assertions: Before the follow-up, rec-111 remains active.
After the cancellation call, rec-111 is cancelled and the distractor records are unchanged.
response_constraints: On the initial turn, explain that the available functions cannot cancel a record; do not call a lookup or claim success.
When the cancellation function is introduced, call it once with the supplied ID and exact reason, then report only the simulated result.

follow_up_turns.content: The simulator now exposes recruiting_cancel. Continue the original request without calling the lookup functions.

prompt: Cancel Jordan Kim, record ID rec-111, because the candidate withdrew from consideration. Use that exact reason and do not touch similarly named records.
